'''âf-v-v-s''' ('''kafavesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immiserize|immiserize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immiserize|immiserize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-v-v-s
|-
! Lemma
| kafavesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifavesoko|thifavesoko]] || [[word:jifavesoko|jifavesoko]] || [[word:shifavesoko|shifavesoko]] || [[word:kifavesoko|kifavesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefavesoko|thefavesoko]] || [[word:jefavesoko|jefavesoko]] || [[word:shefavesoko|shefavesoko]] || [[word:kefavesoko|kefavesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofavesoko|thofavesoko]] || [[word:jofavesoko|jofavesoko]] || [[word:shofavesoko|shofavesoko]] || [[word:kofavesoko|kofavesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofavesoko|thofavesoko]] || [[word:jofavesoko|jofavesoko]] || [[word:shofavesoko|shofavesoko]] || [[word:kofavesoko|kofavesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfavesoko|thĂŠfavesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfavesoko|jĂŠfavesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfavesoko|shĂŠfavesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfavesoko|kĂŠfavesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
